items.eval_output: You may bring one carry-on bag weighing up to 50 pounds, with maximum dimensions of 22 x 14 x 9 inches.
items.expected_output: You are allowed one bag under 50 pounds and 22 x 14 x 9 inches.
items.description: Verify correct baggage size and weight limits

eval_input.user_message: How many seats are on the plane?

items.eval_output: There are 120 seats total — 22 business class and 98 economy. Exit rows are at rows 4 and 16.
items.expected_output: There are 120 seats: 22 business class and 98 economy.
items.description: Confirm seat count and class breakdown

eval_input.user_message: Is there wifi on the plane?

items.eval_output: Yes, we offer complimentary wifi. Connect to the network named Airline-Wifi once on board.
items.expected_output: We have free wifi on the plane, join Airline-Wifi.
items.description: Verify wifi availability and network name

items.eval_output: You can cancel your booking up to 24 hours before departure for a full refund. Cancellations within 24 hours incur a $50 fee.
items.expected_output: Full refund for cancellations 24+ hours before departure; $50 fee within 24 hours.
items.description: Check cancellation deadlines and associated fees

eval_input.user_message: Do you serve meals on the flight?

items.eval_output: We serve complimentary snacks and beverages on all flights. Business class passengers receive a full meal service.
items.expected_output: Complimentary snacks for all; full meals in business class.
items.description: Verify meal service differs by travel class
